mapper.sql: select id, tenant_id, accessory_code, name, spec, unit, manufacturer_name, remark, del_flag, delete_by, delete_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from equipment_accessory
mapper.select:
tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) and accessory_code like concat('%', #{accessoryCode}, '%') and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by create_time desc
where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null)
select count(*) from equipment_accessory where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and accessory_code = #{code} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) and id != #{excludeId}
mapper.insert: insert into equipment_accessory (id, tenant_id, accessory_code, name, spec, unit, manufacturer_name, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{accessoryCode}, #{name}, #{spec}, #{unit}, #{manufacturerName}, #{remark}, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
